textByHash.018a4e35a27124fe0276e1385ce64a79ebd20387: Hi buddy! Or do ya want me to call ya now?
textByHash.0bb3a21787a60943ef2e0bef4146cbe15e7931e6: You might have noticed he's kind of... messed in the head buddy! He's real paranoid about people stealing his golden apples, isn't he?
textByHash.23b629d27bd8e83b745d8821c15fa0d5d64e69e5: Hey, suit yourself buddy. You change your mind, the bank of Askeladden is open for deposits 24 hours a day! Eh-heh-heh-heh-heh.
textByHash.2a275e69b03eebf59637863d0ef1ab0d2eb9e1aa: Now are ya gonna sell me some beer, or are you going to cry about it all day?
textByHash.3ce41565d11ee3f818e7197fac44697770596b01: I guess you could do a bit of shopping. We got fresh fish at the docks, and some armour and weapons at Skulgrimen's place.
textByHash.47cbc02f9f8f710b469b9e9c8b0b2533fb6c02ce: Well it's sure a weird place to ask for it buddy, but I have hundreds of them! Go wild!
textByHash.4a2f57f2835791fd6f756eacf9d82d0a2b63f627: Or if you got any animal parts, I'll trade ya something for 'em!
textByHash.51fb3855fe2ac7d194177d84843d527fbde233ff: Well I'll tell you what buddy; As it's you, I'll give you that written promise. All I ask in return for it is a measly 5000 gold. What do you say?
textByHash.588e39cd4fb7ed90ecf175ae1b7f55b254900a14: Sorry buddy, I'm not allowed into the Longhall. Don't worry, he's easy to spot. He's the one in the fancy helmet. Oh, and he only has one eye.
textByHash.5902bc783292401a1ad47c5bdacaf25690147aa9: Yeah, that's the spirit buddy! It's all real easy, I wouldn't worry yourself about it, you'll be quaffing beers in the longhall as a Fremennik in no time!
textByHash.5c472d6c6acff43fe79a82943a0d0b40b74dea00: Okay pal. If you need anything, come back to me but keep it on the down low.
textByHash.5ce5ef7c8e6f9f22f98299bd71a2946cf8c59c28: You and me both buddy! We're both doing the same trials! This is my trial of manhood! How you finding it so far? Pretty easy, huh buddy?
textByHash.5d441fca516b188466fa26aae057b81e9814c46a: If you got a keg of beer on you I'll buy it off ya for 500 gold coins, buddy!
textByHash.5f93d518e9ad2f475478b3738d23903ebd36fa0c: Awwwwwww.... but the longhall is just SO MUCH FUN! I'd live there if I could! I suppose you really need that promise to help become a Fremennik, huh?
textByHash.623214561dd063707c768422a5ee10bf0ee78a23: [laugh][laugh]! Yeah, that Lalli... what a maroon!
textByHash.6d04db7c02079314faf9aa57a2a805191aae8d0d: If ya found any animal parts killing dagger-mouths I'll trade ya for them too!
textByHash.6e4c682379bf0ca91bc5a6ee2454411b8ef4b4b9: Trying to scam me, huh buddy? Well it won't work! You come back with the cash, or don't come back at all!
textByHash.7220b39874d3604a3840c5b31c0746a282f78f58: Sure thing buddy, although I have to say, I doubt even that troll is stupid enough to fall for the SAME trick TWICE in a row! You can try anyway though!
textByHash.787781ffaa174445f6bdc529c24289e575478d85: and passed my trial of manhood, I will be given a new name, as is our custom, and will therefore not be Askeladden anymore! That guarantee isn't worth the paper it's written on!!
textByHash.7cc2c059d3daaab39df3ec912a9dde2b1b856307: I'll trade ya animal parts for cooked lobsters if ya interested buddy!
textByHash.7e47dfbdc3e29a27902291b97df44fddc1181dbf: You wanna sell me the lot buddy, or one at a time?
textByHash.7f6966f6afd336a7295713e05059f306aa7e3ab4: Hey pal... listen. I shouldn't really be talking to you. Everyone is saying you're a bad person. They say you were exiled!
textByHash.81b4369f1e0714b0e844a156bcce473c9e1654ce: Well buddy, let me tell you, killing those dagger-mouths is sure thirsty work!
textByHash.8218d2e6fb31c8268b8f4d1ab023e18d6af4acc0: Aha! It is because I am cunning! That guarantee says that Askeladden will never enter the longhall again! But when I have completed my Fremennik trials,
textByHash.839a25abfb69def0291e03122582f55285f3a4da: I'll trade ya animal parts for cooked tuna, ya interested outerlander?
textByHash.86c76938ac9cdc09ddbcaaff53977ff8761e1c6c: You wanna trade me the lot buddy, or just one type?
textByHash.876b4abda5a6c90b928d6b945f05f62b619951c8: Hey buddy, I'll trade ya that for some food! Ya interested?
textByHash.89e4f759d2f18dc03220ed2faf73d05870a1adca: Well, as you know, I am doing the same trials that you are as part of my test of manhood, and that troll is the only one who can get that wool.
textByHash.921daad6f627e0c4914a5cc1c0ffcfe903dc962d: Well, if ya change your mind, I'm gonna be here waiting for a drink, buddy!
textByHash.93bee9645d83ea485bd34399e161754456e810f2: You didn't think I would give up going to the longhall for only 5000 did you?
textByHash.9578fc8c3cbe4bd5f9bb2ce250559b781b0b93e2: Aw, buddy... What did I ever do to you?
textByHash.9e0d709fe890f370e47023b75d31f42aa616c577: Nah, nah, nah... He just wears an eyepatch! Well, see ya around buddy!
textByHash.a2b19084eeae34cebbab40d5a531a79b4b1a4384: Done, and done. Let me know if you got any more cash burning a hole in your pocket I can relieve you of, buddy.
textByHash.a71af569cd6d932c63281cafca47340107ba8398: Wanna sell me ya kegs of beer for 500 gold coins each outerlander?
textByHash.a909ff2a24ecf8522f201f1a5a18ef56a924f5da: Me? On the council? Ha ha ha ha! Sorry buddy, I'm not a 'real' Fremennik yet! Let me guess, you're trying to get some council members to vote for you?
textByHash.a961ab169606f7d444f1bd85a091c550e3d07b7b: Hey there, buddy. You're an outerlander, huh? I'm not really supposed to talk to you.
textByHash.ab2d4ad2f99f506e38f48a8e998104a2b45f587c: A pet that would never need him to clean up its... well, you know, buddy. A pet that would always be loyal to him! A faithful companion for life!
textByHash.ae82f2beaed053c2e6496f02fe397e1871a91c21: What? I can't believe she asked you to get a written promise from me to stay out!
textByHash.aecd791f5b14e920f5958e25dbfd283831a3c693: Buddy, I hafta say; if brains were explosives, that troll wouldn't have enough to blow his nose!
textByHash.b31f19fdfe008446b1861d81b762b786c02bb785: His names Brundt, buddy. He's a real boring guy. You can find him in the longhall there.
textByHash.b7970b3d60f2ba4bb34e95f5e363a7df3131fa02: Hey buddy, I'll tell you what, if you got any kegs of beer on ya, I'll buy them off ya for 700 gold coins each!
textByHash.bf08c323161f0ac5491d9d5849085fd547193052: I was down in that cave killing dagger-mouths! It was fun! But then I got thirsty, so came up here for a bit of a rest...
textByHash.bf953c4ca5bbaeaf2571480900ee24c65c7ac20a: Yup, sure is buddy! That Lalli is stupid, even by troll standards!
textByHash.bfc5d5ee27c406b697df42e517ac77ac0f8b0398: Hey, don't judge our customs outerlander! Now you want the cash or you want to bug me?
textByHash.c09876a45984bfae98a8b30787c85a6e24c50a6d: It was easy buddy! I persuaded him he needed a pet to help him guard his apples. A pet that would never sleep! A pet that would never need food, or exercise!
textByHash.cf28a9681abec7cb66fb9aa586773d31a4856eae: Sure thing buddy! I'd say take better care of this one, but it's just a rock! I have hundreds of them! Go wild!
textByHash.d343333980f35ce93d0254d4cf250b1f4267e341: Didn't think old Jarvald would let an outerlander come kill dagger-mouths with him!
textByHash.df47afef73f5109f78c79f5bf5de5867f5f89609: Sure thing, but you'd better free up some space first.
textByHash.e09e49cf050ed9bf148efaa770ffba69e4ce8552: Ha! Ain't as good as my name buddy! So what can I do ya for?
textByHash.e1ce1110450609f9eeed31120482456305ef434a: Well, I'm not going back down there until I get a drink buddy! Come see me if you find me a keg, I pay good money!
textByHash.e46f11b34925326fe99226024fbf439016a3c318: Sure, have as many as you like. I've plenty more!
textByHash.e7fd6ace4a3d72e6254fd2c35d4b006f35c5e5d0: Hey there, buddy. You're an outerlander, huh?
textByHash.e80bf23164dc6486ef9bf218587101ac533bcbaa: Wanna sell me kegs of beer for 700 gold coins each buddy?
textByHash.e849b4c2e3be5ca574dc770c0482de41fe7a2d8c: Hey, don't talk to me like that buddy! I've done all the trials you have and I'm just as mucha Fremennik as you are!
textByHash.ea725fe3d7168f4a8154ba9503d46c0e7ad8a5b9: Hey buddy! That ain't my name no more! My new Fremennik name is Larravak! What's yours?
textByHash.ec79781ac00b85914a1a13865724969f6320590a: I believe you buddy! I just can't really be seen talking to you.
textByHash.fe2725cc72f45a662aff47a1052a9432ee7ce269: Man, can you believe that stupid troll traded me some of his golden wool for a worthless ROCK?
textByHash.feeedc047dd1ff2752f3338ca28e014ac319facf: I dunno buddy. Some stupid tradition or other. We're always told not to talk to outerlanders unless the Chieftain has allowed it.
